name: X API MCP Presets
description: Official X hosted MCP server reached through the xurl stdio bridge.
setup_hint: Set XAPI_CLIENT_ID and XAPI_CLIENT_SECRET, register http://localhost:8080/callback on your X app (or set XAPI_REDIRECT_URI), then run auth_status or auth_oauth2_headless once before using list_tools/call_tool.

auth_status.description: Check whether xurl has a usable X OAuth session cached for MCP use.

auth_oauth2_headless.description: Bootstrap the xurl OAuth session on a headless machine using X's out-of-band login flow.

list_tools.description: List the official X MCP tools currently exposed through the hosted xapi bridge.

call_tool.description: Invoke any official X MCP tool by name with a structured arguments object.
